parameters.content: Connector template for Antigravity::push_workspace_stub. Fill placeholder env vars before execution.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{"service_name":"antigravity","display_name":"Antigravity","operation_id":"push_workspace_stub","method":"POST","base_url":"{$env.ANTIGRAVITY_BASE_URL}","path":"/v1/workspaces/__ANTIGRAVITY_WORKSPACE_ID__/sync","url":"{$env.ANTIGRAVITY_BASE_URL}/v1/workspaces/__ANTIGRAVITY_WORKSPACE_ID__/sync","headers":{"Authorization":"Bearer {$env.ANTIGRAVITY_ACCESS_TOKEN}"},"body":{},"query":{},"integration_mode":"workspace_bridge","status":"placeholder_only","credential_placeholders":["ANTIGRAVITY_BASE_URL","ANTIGRAVITY_ACCESS_TOKEN"],"notes":"Workspace bridge placeholder for agentic IDE handoff."}}];
return [{json:{status:'placeholder_only', service:$json.service_name, operation:$json.operation_id, integration_mode:$json.integration_mode, body:$json.body, notes:$json.notes}}];
